From initial consultations to post-operative follow-ups, supportive and patient-friendly environment Eye Care That we Specialize in Cataract Treatment A cataract is the clouding of the normally clear lens of the eye and is mostly caused by aging of the eye, family history, diabetes, etc. Read More LASIK & Refractive Are you tired of wearing spectacles all the time? Are glasses affecting your productivity at work? LASIK treatment may reduce your dependence on glasses or contact lenses. Read More Diabetic Eye Care The most important point is that even in advanced cases, the disease may progress a long way without symptoms; hence, regular eye examinations for people with diabetes are important. Read More Squint Treatment Squinting is a common eye problem that is cosmetically very bothersome at times. Squint is of various types, and the treatment spectrum is huge. Read More Glaucoma Treatment Do you experience blind spots, headaches, halos around lights, or blurred vision? By getting your eyes examined, you can identify glaucoma. Read More Pediatric Ophthal Pediatric ophthalmology is a specialized field of general ophthalmology, and Shekar Eye Hospital has the best pediatric ophthalmologist in Bangalore, delivering exceptional care and services to young patients. Read More Oculoplasty Procedures Oculoplasty, often recognized as oculoplastic surgery, is a specialized branch of ophthalmology that deals with the restoration, reconstruction, and improvement of the structures surrounding the eye. Read More Cornea The cornea is the transparent front part of the eye that covers the iris, pupil, and anterior chamber, playing a crucial role in focusing light and protecting the eye. Read More Myopia (Nearsightedness) Explore Bangalore's leading medical hospital which is Shekar Eye Hospital to find the best and most advanced options for Myopia treatment, ensuring comprehensive care for your vision needs. Read More Vitrectomy Surgery Vitrectomy surgery is a specialized procedure performed to address various eye conditions, particularly those affecting the vitreous humour, a gel-like substance within the eye. Read More Retina The retina is a complex and crucial component of the eye responsible for converting light into signals that the brain interprets as vision. Our comprehensive services, from diagnostics to treatment, are delivered by seasoned experts in a patient-friendly environment. What sets Shekar Eye Hospital apart from other eye care centers in Bangalore? Located in J.P. Nagar, near Jayanagar, we stand out for our multi-specialty ophthalmic services, cutting-edge technology, and a legacy of excellence since 1999. Our commitment to top-notch patient care and a full suite of services under one roof makes us a preferred choice. How does Shekar Eye Hospital ensure the highest quality of eye care? As a NABH-accredited institution, we adhere to stringent quality standards. Our team uses the latest technology and methods in eye care, ensuring that each patient receives individualized and effective treatment. What range of services can patients expect at Shekar Eye Hospital? We offer an all-encompassing range of services, from advanced diagnostics to specialized surgeries and treatments, along with a fully-equipped pharmacy, all conveniently located under one roof. Can international patients access services at Shekar Eye Hospital? Absolutely! We cater to a global clientele, offering world-class eye care services with a touch of traditional Indian hospitality, making every patient’s visit comfortable and hassle-free. What is the legacy of Shekar Eye Hospital in the field of ophthalmology? Established in 1999 by Dr. Y.L. Rajashekar, our hospital has grown into one of Karnataka’s leading eye care institutions, renowned for our comprehensive approach and a track record of successful treatments. How does Shekar Eye Hospital integrate technology into patient care? We leverage cutting-edge technology in all aspects of eye care – from diagnostics to surgery – ensuring precision, safety, and the best outcomes for our patients. How Convenient Is It to Book an Appointment at Shekar Eye Hospital? Scheduling an appointment with us is a breeze! You can quickly secure your slot online for any service, from routine check-ups to specialized treatments. Our online booking is available Monday to Saturday from 9 am to 8 pm, and Sunday from 10 am to 1 pm. If you prefer to speak with us directly, just call +91 9980562020.
